## Checklist

- [ ] `shellcheck` is clean on every shell file I touched (info-level included).
- [ ] `ruff check scripts` is clean if I touched Python.
- [ ] I added or updated a test where it applies (`tests/`).
- [ ] I updated docs (`README.md` / `docs/`) where behaviour changed.
- [ ] I read the relevant ADR under `docs/adr/`, and added a new one if this is
      a significant decision.
